root_classification.fix_kept: hypsometric_opt=2 LOG-form al/alb in diagnose_pressure_al_alt (per-stage refresh + pg_buoy_w stage pressure) and rk_addtend_dry._absolute_diagnostics (large-step HPG), threaded via OperationalNamelist.hypsometric_opt; real pipelines pass 2, idealized paths keep 1 (their generator metrics carry placeholder c3f/c4f). Kept: it is a real, native-face-proven WRF-faithfulness fix (evolving-p bias -19.5 Pa -> -0.005 Pa).
root_classification.hpg_face_root_cause_FIXED: JAX runtime calc_p_rho_phi diagnostics (al/alt/p) used WRF hypsometric_opt=1 (linear) everywhere; WRF real cases run the Registry default hypsometric_opt=2 (LOG form), and the carried base alb is ALSO the LOG-form base. Native-face proof: with the fix the large-step HPG per-face terms match WRF native truth to ~1.3-1.9e-4 rel (dpx rmse 0.070 vs signal 368; legacy was rmse 6.05 / max 87, concentrated in the pb*al branch), and the state arrays p/ph/pb/mu are bit-identical at RK1 of step 7201.
root_classification.next_implementation_target: The acoustic-substep lane (advance_uv/advance_w/advance_mu work-array evolution and ww divergence) between RK-stage boundaries. The WRF stage-boundary truth for this is ALREADY CAPTURED: hpg_dumps calls 21602/21603 (RK2/RK3 of step 7201) and 21604-21606 (step 7202) contain the live post-substep p/ph/al/alt/mu arrays; instrument the JAX operational stage states at the same boundaries and bisect the first diverging stage increment. No new WRF run is needed.
root_classification.venting_blocker_verdict: REFUTED as the venting blocker: with the HPG native faces now exact, the h36->h37 full-physics excess outflux collapses only ~1.0% (old -28.62 -> fixed -28.33 Pa/cell/h). The d01 strong-flow dry mass venting is NOT caused by the large-step horizontal PGF inputs or operator at the RK-stage boundary.

same_state_alt_forms.reading: WRF live alt (EOS-implied from file P/THM) IS the hypsometric_opt=2 LOG form to fp32 roundoff; the hypsometric_opt=1 linear form the JAX runtime used is one-signed off with terrain-modulated structure.

wrf_source_anchors.gen2_hpg_identical_to_pristine: diff of horizontal_pressure_gradient gen2 vs pristine 4.7.1: byte-identical
